overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in wizard robes exploring the interior of a rustic wooden cottage. The character descends a staircase and walks through sunlit rooms with period furniture, wooden beams, and plaid rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage staircase and upper landing

events.description: begins descending wooden staircase from upper landing
exits staircase into main hall with wooden plank walls

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down wooden stairs while surveying the lower floor interior

entered.detail: rustic wooden banister with vertical spindles on upper floor
dark wooden chest of drawers on upper landing
thick exposed wooden structural beams and pillars
white painted cabinet with glass panel doors
framed portrait of a bearded man on the wall
heavy wooden plank door with iron hinges

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an upper wooden landing, descending a rustic staircase into a dimly lit hall. Dark wooden furniture and support beams dominate the space, with a white glass cabinet visible against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall transitioning to dining area

events.description: turns left toward the sunlit dining area with large windows
bright sunlight streams through grid windows creating illuminated patches on the wooden floor

agents.ego_description: walking across the main hall toward the sunlit dining area with wicker furniture

entered.detail: circular wooden dining table with white tablecloth
light-colored wicker chairs arranged around the table
tall windows with small panes letting in bright morning sunlight
long wooden console table against the wall
suspended basket with green foliage hanging from ceiling
green and blue plaid patterned rug on the floor
framed portrait of a figure in red robes above a dresser
pinkish wooden chest of drawers with decorative items on top

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a bright dining area where sunlight streams through large grid windows. A round table with wicker chairs sits on a plaid rug, while a pink dresser and portrait become visible against the far wall.

events.description: approaches side door while examining the coat rack and wall furnishings

agents.ego_description: moving toward the side exit while looking at the coat rack and wall lantern

entered.detail: wooden standing coat rack with curved hooks near the window
small wooden side door with simple frame
small paned window with wooden frame
ornate wall-mounted metal lantern with glass panels
small wooden table near the coat rack

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a side door in the dining nook, passing a wooden coat rack and small side table. The dining table shifts to the right as the character approaches the exit, with wall sconces and a small window becoming prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed upper hallway into a bright, sun-drenched dining area. It begins on an upper wooden landing, descending a rustic staircase into a dimly lit hall characterized by dark wooden beams and a white glass cabinet. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a luminous dining space where sunlight streams through large grid windows, illuminating a round table with wicker chairs atop a plaid rug. The camera then shifts past a pink dresser and a wall portrait, gliding toward a side door in the dining nook. Finally, the view passes a wooden coat rack and small side table, with the dining area receding to the right as the character approaches the exit beneath wall sconces and a small window.
